cp3_condition: Track source annex extraction gaps before broad Tier A overlay backfill.

records.impact: The question can be reconstructed as a task, but a reviewer cannot fully verify or reproduce the calculation from the mirrored JSON alone.
blocked_scope: silent bulk Tier A overlay backfill for source-value-dependent questions
treating source-value-dependent Tier A overlays as fully reconstructable when annex values are absent
records.next_action: Add a source annex extraction workflow or require explicit source_values_not_extracted records with proof-to-close before broad Tier A overlay backfill.
records.proof_required_to_close: The referenced source values from bron 1 are extractable through a reviewed source-annex record, or the overlay carries a reviewed, explicit gap status and downstream tools surface that warning.
